moments.title: The Open Championship Reaches Climax
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship continues at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, with the final rounds taking place this weekend.

angles.name: Golf action
angles.copy: Who will lift the Claret Jug? The Open Championship is live from Royal Birkdale all weekend. Catch the final rounds as golf's biggest names battle it out!

angles.name: Weekend watch
angles.copy: Your weekend plans sorted: The Open Championship is reaching its climax at Royal Birkdale. Tune in for all the drama on the greens.

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Top 5 Shocks
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold number one, but World Cup anthems 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' surge into the top 3 on the latest Official Singles Chart.

angles.name: Chart rundown
angles.copy: Huge news on the Official Singles Chart today! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still #1, but Wonderwall and Three Lions are rocketing up thanks to World Cup fever.

angles.name: Wonderwall comeback
angles.copy: It's back! Oasis's 'Wonderwall' is an unofficial England anthem and has surged to number 2 in the Official Singles Chart. Is it finally time for its #1 moment?

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, a highlight of the 2026 athletics season, takes place at the London Stadium on Saturday, July 18.

angles.name: Track & Field
angles.copy: World-class athletes descend on London Stadium tomorrow for the London Athletics Meet! Who are you backing to break records?

angles.name: Weekend sport
angles.copy: If you're in London this weekend, get ready for some elite track and field action at the London Athletics Meet. It's set to be a spectacular day!

moments.title: Bruno Mars Wembley Residency
moments.blurb: Bruno Mars brings his highly anticipated residency to Wembley Stadium, with multiple dates this week including Saturday, July 18, Sunday, July 19, and next week.

angles.name: Wembley takeover
angles.copy: Bruno Mars is taking over Wembley Stadium this weekend! If you've got tickets, get ready for a night of incredible hits and smooth moves.

angles.name: Live in London
angles.copy: London is buzzing with Bruno Mars fever! The superstar is playing multiple dates at Wembley, bringing the Hooligans to the capital.

moments.title: Splendour Festival Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottingham's biggest festival, Splendour, takes place this weekend, July 18-19, at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, featuring five stages of music.

angles.name: Nottingham festival
angles.copy: Splendour Festival kicks off tomorrow in Nottingham! Who are you excited to see across the five stages at Wollaton Hall?

angles.name: Weekend vibes
angles.copy: The sun's out (hopefully!) and Splendour Festival is ready to go this weekend in Nottingham. Get your festival face on!

moments.title: Maid of Stone Festival
moments.blurb: The Maid of Stone Festival, a rock and metal event, is happening this weekend, July 17-19, in Maidstone, Kent.

angles.name: Rock weekend
angles.copy: Maid of Stone Festival is ON! Get ready for a huge weekend of rock and metal in Kent. Who's heading down?

angles.name: Festival alert
angles.copy: Kent is rocking this weekend with Maid of Stone Festival! If you love your music heavy, this is where you need to be.

moments.title: Doune the Rabbit Hole Festival
moments.blurb: Doune the Rabbit Hole, a music and arts festival, takes place this weekend, July 17-19, in Stirlingshire, Scotland.

angles.name: Scottish festival
angles.copy: Doune the Rabbit Hole is live this weekend in Stirlingshire! Head north for an eclectic mix of music and arts.

angles.name: Festival vibes
angles.copy: Scotland's Doune the Rabbit Hole festival is bringing the good times this weekend. Get ready for some unique tunes!

moments.title: Happy 50th, Luke Bryan!
moments.blurb: American country superstar Luke Bryan celebrates his 50th birthday today, July 17.

angles.name: Country star
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to country music sensation Luke Bryan, who turns 50 today! What's your favourite Luke Bryan track?

angles.name: Celebrating 50
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to the one and only Luke Bryan! Here's to another year of great country music.

moments.title: Happy 44th, Natasha Hamilton!
moments.blurb: Atomic Kitten singer Natasha Hamilton celebrates her 44th birthday today, July 17.

angles.name: Atomic Kitten star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 44th Birthday to Atomic Kitten's Natasha Hamilton today! What's your favourite hit from the group?

angles.name: Pop princess
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Natasha Hamilton! Celebrating the Atomic Kitten star's 44th today.

moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games Begin
moments.blurb: The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games commence on Thursday, July 23, bringing 11 days of multi-sport action to Scotland.

angles.name: Games countdown
angles.copy: Just six days until the Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games kick off! Get ready for 11 days of incredible sporting achievements.

angles.name: Scotland hosts
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are coming to Glasgow next week! Which events are you most looking forward to watching?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Returns
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, one of the UK's premier music and arts festivals, takes place in Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26.

angles.name: Suffolk's big one
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just around the corner, kicking off next Thursday in Henham Park! Who's joining the fun in Suffolk?

angles.name: Festival vibes
angles.copy: Get ready for a weekend of music, arts, and culture as Latitude Festival returns next week. The countdown is on!

moments.title: Truck Festival Oxfordshire
moments.blurb: Truck Festival, known for its indie and alternative lineup, runs from July 23-26 at Hill Farm, Steventon, Oxfordshire.

angles.name: Indie festival
angles.copy: Truck Festival is back next week for another dose of indie and alternative greatness in Oxfordshire! Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: Weekend getaway
angles.copy: Planning your festival escape? Truck Festival starts next Thursday, bringing big names and new sounds to Hill Farm.

moments.title: WOMAD Festival
moments.blurb: The World of Music, Arts and Dance (WOMAD) Festival returns to Neston Park, North Wiltshire, from July 23-26, celebrating global culture.

angles.name: Global sounds
angles.copy: WOMAD Festival is almost here! Get ready for a truly global celebration of music, arts, and dance in Wiltshire, starting next Thursday.

angles.name: Cultural journey
angles.copy: Experience the world without leaving Wiltshire! WOMAD Festival kicks off next week, promising an incredible cultural journey.

moments.title: Happy 79th, Don Henley!
moments.blurb: Founding member of The Eagles, Don Henley, celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Eagles legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to The Eagles' legendary Don Henley this Wednesday! What's your favourite Henley-penned classic?

angles.name: Rock icon
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the iconic Don Henley! Celebrating the Eagles drummer and vocalist turning 79 this week.

moments.title: Happy 61st, Slash!
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitar hero Slash celebrates his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23.

angles.name: Guitar legend
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash! The Guns N' Roses icon celebrates his big day next Thursday. What's your favourite guitar solo?

angles.name: Rock royalty
angles.copy: Get ready to shred! Guns N' Roses legend Slash turns 61 next week. Celebrate with his greatest riffs!

moments.title: Happy 83rd, Mick Jagger!
moments.blurb: Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26.

angles.name: Rock icon
angles.copy: Can you believe it? The legendary Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday! Wishing the Rolling Stones frontman a very Happy Birthday.

angles.name: Still rolling
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the ageless Mick Jagger! Still dominating stages and inspiring generations. What's your favourite Stones track?

moments.title: Happy 33rd, Taylor Momsen!
moments.blurb: The Pretty Reckless frontwoman Taylor Momsen celebrates her 33rd birthday on Sunday, July 26.

angles.name: Rock star
angles.copy: Wishing a huge Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Taylor Momsen of The Pretty Reckless this Sunday! What's your favourite song from the band?

angles.name: Birthday rock
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Taylor Momsen! The Pretty Reckless singer turns 33 this weekend. Crank up the volume!

moments.title: Summer Holiday Season in Full Swing
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are well underway across the UK, with many families enjoying breaks, especially in Scotland and Northern Ireland where terms ended earlier, and England/Wales starting soon.

angles.name: Holiday vibes
angles.copy: Summer holidays are in full swing for many across the UK! Where are you heading for your break, or what staycation plans do you have?

angles.name: Family fun
angles.copy: The kids are off school! Whether you're at home or away, share your best summer holiday tips for keeping everyone entertained.

moments.title: 'Elle' (Legally Blonde prequel) Streaming
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated 'Legally Blonde' prequel series, 'Elle', which follows a teenage Elle Woods, is now streaming on Prime Video.

angles.name: New TV binge
angles.copy: If you love Legally Blonde, you need to watch 'Elle'! The prequel series is streaming now on Prime Video. What do you think of teenage Elle Woods?

angles.name: What to watch
angles.copy: Bend and snap your way to the TV! The 'Legally Blonde' prequel 'Elle' is a must-watch this summer. Perfect for a feel-good binge.

moments.title: 'The Dark' Scottish Thriller
moments.blurb: New Scottish thriller 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, is currently airing on ITV, set in the idyllic Scottish wilderness.

angles.name: Thriller alert
angles.copy: Looking for a new drama? 'The Dark', a tense Scottish thriller, is airing now on ITV. Expect twists, turns, and stunning scenery!

angles.name: Scottish drama
angles.copy: Set in the beautiful but eerie Scottish wilderness, 'The Dark' is your next must-watch ITV drama. Have you started watching?

moments.title: Big Love Festival South Wales
moments.blurb: The Big Love music festival, celebrating its 10th year, is taking place this July in the countryside just outside Bristol and Cardiff, featuring 140+ bands and DJs.

angles.name: Welsh festival
angles.copy: Big Love Festival is celebrating its 10th year in South Wales this July! Get ready for an independent festival with a huge heart and incredible lineup.

angles.name: Local music
angles.copy: South Wales is buzzing for Big Love Festival! 140+ bands and DJs, circus, cabaret – it's all happening this month. Who's going?
